rawIntent: Add a padEnd utility under src/shared/utils/pad-end that right-pads a string to a target length

successCriteria.description: The padEnd utility correctly right-pads a string to the specified target length.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Changes to existing utilities outside of the padEnd function.
UI changes related to the usage of the padEnd utility.
